questionHtml:
The cost of a journey on the different boat routes is given in the following table; all prices are given in USD. The cost of a journey is the same in either direction between two ports.

Sofia wants to make a trip where she travels on each of the boat routes at least once, beginning and ending at port A.

Hence, write down the number of different ways that someone could start at port B and end at port C, using three boat route journeys.

meta.title: Hence, write down the number of different ways that someone could start at port B and end at port C, using three boat route journeys.
